docs.title: About bdc-variable-library
docs.text: LinkML models for variables in the BDC Knowledge Library

docs.title: bdc-variable-library
docs.text:
LinkML models for variables in the BDC Knowledge Library

URI: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library

Name: bdc-variable-library

docs.title: Classes
docs.text: Class Description Entity Any resource that has its own identifier AlertValue Character used to add information to a datum MissingValue Character used to indicate a missing value in a data set ResearchStudy Variable A generic grouping for any variable CompoundVariable Represents a variable and all metadata SingleVariable Represents a single entry in a data dictionary

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Slot Description alert_value List of values that provide extra optional information about a variable associated_study The study that produced the variable data bdchm_type cde_id CURIE from Condor coded_values Pipe-delimited string of allowable values comment Any text comment provided by the original data provider concept_type CURIE describing the main content of the variable data_type The data type found in this variable file_id Identifier used by the organization providing the variable to BDC to uniquely... file_name Name of file containing variable data id A unique identifier for a variable within BDC indicator_char Sentinel value used to add information to a datum or indicate a missing datum indicator_meaning Meaning of the indicator character verbatim from original data provider when ... maximum_value The highest value present in the data for this variable metadata List of variable identifiers providing metadata for a compound variable minimum_value The lowest value present in the data for this variable missing_value Sentinel value to indicate a missing value or other data nuance resolution The number of decimal places a measurement is represented in the data source_id Identifier used by the organization providing the variable to BDC to uniquely... source_variable_description Description of the variable provided by the original data provider Correspond... unit Ideally a unit of measure from UCUM variable_description Human readable description of the variable variable_label Human readable label describing the variable variable_name The name of the variable according to the original data provider Corresponds ...

docs.title: Enumerations
docs.text: Enumeration Description BdchmTypeEnum A list of BDCHM entities used to describe variables DataTypeEnum A category of data

docs.title: Types
docs.text: Type Description Boolean A binary (true or false) value Curie a compact URI Date a date (year, month and day) in an idealized calendar DateOrDatetime Either a date or a datetime Datetime The combination of a date and time Decimal A real number with arbitrary precision that conforms to the xsd:decimal speci... Double A real number that conforms to the xsd:double specification Float A real number that conforms to the xsd:float specification Integer An integer Jsonpath A string encoding a JSON Path Jsonpointer A string encoding a JSON Pointer Ncname Prefix part of CURIE Nodeidentifier A URI, CURIE or BNODE that represents a node in a model Objectidentifier A URI or CURIE that represents an object in the model Sparqlpath A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path String A character string Time A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular... Uri a complete URI Uriorcurie a URI or a CURIE

docs.title: Class: AlertValue
docs.text: Character used to add information to a datum

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: AlertValue
description: Character used to add information to a datum
from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
is_a: Entity
attributes:
  indicator_char:
    name: indicator_char
    description: Sentinel value used to add information to a datum or indicate a missing
      datum
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: AlertValue
    domain_of:
    - MissingValue
    - AlertValue
    range: string
  indicator_meaning:
    name: indicator_meaning
    description: Meaning of the indicator character verbatim from original data provider
      when possible
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: AlertValue
    domain_of:
    - MissingValue
    - AlertValue
    range: string
  id:
    name: id
    description: A unique identifier for a variable within BDC
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:identifier
    identifier: true
    owner: AlertValue
    domain_of:
    - Entity
    range: uriorcurie
    required: true

docs.title: Enum: BdchmTypeEnum
docs.text: A list of BDCHM entities used to describe variables

docs.title: Boolean
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Boolean

A binary (true or false) value

docs.title: Class: CompoundVariable
docs.text: Represents a variable and all metadata

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: CompoundVariable
description: Represents a variable and all metadata
from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
is_a: Variable
attributes:
  cde_id:
    name: cde_id
    description: CURIE from Condor
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - CompoundVariable
    range: uriorcurie
  bdchm_type:
    name: bdchm_type
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - CompoundVariable
    range: BdchmTypeEnum
  metadata:
    name: metadata
    description: List of variable identifiers providing metadata for a compound variable
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - CompoundVariable
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  alert_value:
    name: alert_value
    description: List of values that provide extra optional information about a variable.
      Often this is used to indicate a violation of QA/QC
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - CompoundVariable
    range: AlertValue
    multivalued: true
  associated_study:
    name: associated_study
    description: The study that produced the variable data
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: bdchm:ResearchStudy
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: ResearchStudy
  variable_description:
    name: variable_description
    description: Human readable description of the variable.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  concept_type:
    name: concept_type
    description: CURIE describing the main content of the variable. This can be from
      OBA, OMOP, or LOINC
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: uriorcurie
  variable_label:
    name: variable_label
    description: Human readable label describing the variable
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  id:
    name: id
    description: A unique identifier for a variable within BDC
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:identifier
    identifier: true
    owner: CompoundVariable
    domain_of:
    - Entity
    range: uriorcurie
    required: true

docs.title: Jsonpath
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Jsonpath

A string encoding a JSON Path. The value of the string MUST conform to JSON Point syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded in tree form.

docs.title: Jsonpointer
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Jsonpointer

A string encoding a JSON Pointer. The value of the string MUST conform to JSON Point syntax and SHOULD dereference to a valid object within the current instance document when encoded in tree form.

docs.title: Class: SingleVariable
docs.text: Represents a single entry in a data dictionary

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: SingleVariable
description: Represents a single entry in a data dictionary
from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
is_a: Variable
attributes:
  source_id:
    name: source_id
    description: Identifier used by the organization providing the variable to BDC
      to uniquely identify the variable in their system. In most cases this will be
      a phv value.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  file_id:
    name: file_id
    description: Identifier used by the organization providing the variable to BDC
      to uniquely identify the file or data table in their system. In most cases this
      will be a pht value
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  file_name:
    name: file_name
    description: Name of file containing variable data
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  variable_name:
    name: variable_name
    description: The name of the variable according to the original data provider
      Corresponds to the VARNAME field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  source_variable_description:
    name: source_variable_description
    description: Description of the variable provided by the original data provider
      Corresponds to the VARDESC field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  data_type:
    name: data_type
    description: The data type found in this variable. Corresponds to the TYPE field
      in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: DataTypeEnum
  unit:
    name: unit
    description: Ideally a unit of measure from UCUM. Corresponds to the UNITS field
      in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  minimum_value:
    name: minimum_value
    description: The lowest value present in the data for this variable. Corresponds
      to  the MIN field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: decimal
  maximum_value:
    name: maximum_value
    description: The highest value present in the data for this variable. Corresponds
      to the MAX field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: decimal
  resolution:
    name: resolution
    description: The number of decimal places a measurement is represented in the
      data. Corresponds to the RESOLUTION field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: integer
  coded_values:
    name: coded_values
    description: Pipe-delimited string of allowable values. Should only be used if
      the data_type is enum. Corresponds to VALUES field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  missing_value:
    name: missing_value
    description: Sentinel value to indicate a missing value or other data nuance
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: MissingValue
    multivalued: true
  comment:
    name: comment
    description: Any text comment provided by the original data provider. Corresponds
      to the  COMMENT field in dbGAP
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - SingleVariable
    range: string
  associated_study:
    name: associated_study
    description: The study that produced the variable data
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: bdchm:ResearchStudy
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: ResearchStudy
  variable_description:
    name: variable_description
    description: Human readable description of the variable.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  concept_type:
    name: concept_type
    description: CURIE describing the main content of the variable. This can be from
      OBA, OMOP, or LOINC
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: uriorcurie
  variable_label:
    name: variable_label
    description: Human readable label describing the variable
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - Variable
    range: string
  id:
    name: id
    description: A unique identifier for a variable within BDC
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:identifier
    identifier: true
    owner: SingleVariable
    domain_of:
    - Entity
    range: uriorcurie
    required: true

docs.title: Sparqlpath
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Sparqlpath

A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path. The value of the string MUST conform to SPARQL syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded as RDF.

docs.title: bdc-variable-library
docs.text:
LinkML models for variables in the BDC Knowledge Library

URI: https://w3id.org/linkml/bdc-variable-library

docs.title: Slot: cde_id
docs.text: CURIE from Condor

docs.title: Slot: coded_values
docs.text: Pipe-delimited string of allowable values. Should only be used if the data_type is enum. Corresponds to VALUES field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: comment
docs.text: Any text comment provided by the original data provider. Corresponds to the COMMENT field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: concept_type
docs.text: CURIE describing the main content of the variable. This can be from OBA, OMOP, or LOINC

docs.title: Slot: data_type
docs.text: The data type found in this variable. Corresponds to the TYPE field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: file_id
docs.text: Identifier used by the organization providing the variable to BDC to uniquely identify the file or data table in their system. In most cases this will be a pht value

docs.title: Slot: file_name
docs.text: Name of file containing variable data

docs.title: Slot: id
docs.text: A unique identifier for a variable within BDC

docs.title: Slot: indicator_char
docs.text: Sentinel value used to add information to a datum or indicate a missing datum

docs.title: Slot: indicator_meaning
docs.text: Meaning of the indicator character verbatim from original data provider when possible

docs.title: Slot: maximum_value
docs.text: The highest value present in the data for this variable. Corresponds to the MAX field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: metadata
docs.text: List of variable identifiers providing metadata for a compound variable

docs.title: Slot: minimum_value
docs.text: The lowest value present in the data for this variable. Corresponds to the MIN field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: missing_value
docs.text: Sentinel value to indicate a missing value or other data nuance

docs.title: Slot: resolution
docs.text: The number of decimal places a measurement is represented in the data. Corresponds to the RESOLUTION field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: source_id
docs.text: Identifier used by the organization providing the variable to BDC to uniquely identify the variable in their system. In most cases this will be a phv value.

docs.title: Slot: source_variable_description
docs.text: Description of the variable provided by the original data provider Corresponds to the VARDESC field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: unit
docs.text: Ideally a unit of measure from UCUM. Corresponds to the UNITS field in dbGAP

docs.title: Slot: variable_description
docs.text: Human readable description of the variable.

docs.title: Slot: variable_label
docs.text: Human readable label describing the variable

docs.title: Slot: variable_name
docs.text: The name of the variable according to the original data provider Corresponds to the VARNAME field in dbGAP
